title: GetResponse vs Zoho Campaigns (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: GetResponse vs Zoho Campaigns: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: GetResponse vs Zoho Campaigns: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between GetResponse and Zoho Campaigns comes down to your specific use case. GetResponse is built for online course creators and webinar hosts, while Zoho Campaigns targets Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses.

comparison_table.tool_a: Online Course Creators And Webinar Hosts

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on online course creators and webinar hosts
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses

faq.q: Is GetResponse better than Zoho Campaigns?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. GetResponse wins for online course creators and webinar hosts, while Zoho Campaigns is stronger for Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, GetResponse or Zoho Campaigns?
faq.a: Zoho Campaigns starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Zoho Campaigns to GetResponse?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
